title: Eleven Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by emergencyBurn() exploit on yield aggregator

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls emergencyBurn() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

red_flags: emergencyBurn() called immediately after flash loan
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls emergencyBurn() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx
summary: The attacker exploited Eleven Finance's yield aggregator by taking a flash loan, converting the borrowed assets to Nerve tokens, depositing them, and then calling emergencyBurn() to withdraw the entire balance, including the attacker's initial deposit.
